title: What's Hidden Under This Stadium?
description:
This is an underground, high-tech, greenhouse…

Temperature, light, and watering are all autonomously controlled, and scientists tested the best artificial conditions for the grass

The grass stays down here for up to 300 days a year until….they bring it to the surface for a MATCH. THIS is Real Madrid’s new “retractable pitch” – the first stadium to do this.

But if sports aren’t your thing, this tech is a BIG deal elsewhere… for more on that and this crazy stadium,
subscribe!

#soccer #science #tech #realmadrid #stadium
